channel.title: Home on Jue Wei
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Jue Wei

item.title: Seeing Around Corners Without a Corner
item.description: Via Natural Scene Encoding, we no longer need a configured occluder to achieve passive NLOS imaging.

item.title: About Me
item.description:
Hi, I am Jue Wei(韦珏).

I am a first-year graduate student at the Hefei National Research Center for Physical Sciences at the Microscale, University of Science and Technology of China (USTC). I previously received my B.S. in Quantum Information Science from the School of the Gifted Young.

My research interests lie broadly in computational imaging, and I am currently exploring opportunities in microscopy imaging. I am working under the supervision of Prof. Feihu Xu (徐飞虎).
